title: hymenophyllum blandum
intro: Hymenophyllum blandum is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand, belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum blandum are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
